component.name: Rucio
component.summary: Peer-to-peer file sharing over libp2p, with eMule/Kad2 compatibility

description.p: Rucio is a peer-to-peer file sharing application built on libp2p. It runs an embedded daemon that joins the Rucio network and, for compatibility, the eMule Kad2 network, letting you search, download and share files.

The desktop app is a thin shell around that daemon, and its whole configuration and database stay inside the Flatpak sandbox. Closing its window keeps it running in the background so sharing continues; manage it from your desktop's background apps menu. By default it can only read and write your Downloads folder; grant access to more directories with a filesystem override when you want to share files from elsewhere.
